basic_details.job_title: HLL Trade Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: HLL Lifecare Limited has released the official Trade Apprentice Notification 2026 on 02-07-2026 at the official website www.lifecarehll.com. A total of 6 vacancies have been announced under the HLL Trade Apprentice Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with ITI in Civil Draughtsman, Plumber, Instrument Mechanic, MRAC, or Mechanic (Diesel) can apply through email from 02-07-2026 to 15-07-2026. The official notification PDF and email application details are available below.

age_limit.details: No specific age limit is mentioned in the official notification. Please refer to the official notification for details on age relaxation.

qualification.education_qualification: ITI in Civil Draughtsman, Plumber, Instrument Mechanic, MRAC, Mechanic (Diesel)
qualification.details: Trade Apprentice: ITI in Civil Draughtsman, Plumber, Instrument Mechanic, MRAC, Mechanic (Diesel). Candidates can apply within 05 years from the date of passing the NCVT approved qualifying examination.

salary_details.details: Rs. 11040/- (For Trade apprentices who have completed two-year ITI course) Rs. 10560/- (For Trade apprentices who have completed one-year ITI course)

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download HLL Trade Apprentice Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.hll_lifecare_limited: ITI in Civil Draughtsman, Plumber, Instrument Mechanic, MRAC, Mechanic (Diesel)

content_sections.heading: HLL Trade Apprentice Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the HLL Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download HLL Trade Apprentice Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: HLL Trade Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
HLL Trade Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Trade Apprentice: ITI in Civil Draughtsman, Plumber, Instrument Mechanic, MRAC, Mechanic (Diesel). Candidates can apply within 05 years from the date of passing the NCVT approved qualifying examination.

content_sections.heading: HLL Trade Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee

rows.category: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: HLL Trade Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: No specific age limit is mentioned in the official notification. Please refer to the official notification for details on age relaxation.

content_sections.heading: HLL Trade Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Rs. 11040/- (For Trade apprentices who have completed two-year ITI course) Rs. 10560/- (For Trade apprentices who have completed one-year ITI course)

content_sections.heading: HLL Trade Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
HLL Trade Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: HLL Trade Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the HLL Trade Apprentice recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 15th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Trade Apprentice post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an ITI certificate in Civil Draughtsman, Plumber, Instrument Mechanic, MRAC, or Mechanic (Diesel) to be eligible for this apprenticeship.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Trade Apprentice position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies for the Trade Apprentice post in HLL Lifecare Limited's Peroorkada Factory.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for the Trade Apprentice?
faq.answer: The stipend for Trade Apprentices is Rs. 11040/- for those with a two-year ITI course and Rs. 10560/- for those with a one-year ITI course.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates need to apply by sending their application via email to the designated email address provided in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Trade Apprentice role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a selection test or an interview, based on which candidates will be shortlisted for the apprenticeship.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any age limit for applying?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify a minimum or maximum age limit. However, candidates are advised to check the official notification for any specific age criteria or relaxation policies.

faq.question: Q8. What is the location of the HLL Lifecare Limited factory for this apprenticeship?
faq.answer: The apprenticeship is for HLL Lifecare Limited's Peroorkada Factory, located in Trivandrum, Kerala.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates with experience apply for this apprenticeship?
faq.answer: The eligibility criteria mention that candidates can apply within 05 years from the date of passing the NCVT approved qualifying examination, implying that recent graduates are preferred.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply?
faq.answer: The official notification and application links are provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article for your convenience.
